---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? What does the current behavior prevent you from doing?

## Proposed solution
Describe the change you'd like to see. Include config examples if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional context
Links to related issues, prior art in other projects, or diagrams.
